sub_mechanisms: M_1: estimate per-layer stability index α from post-softmax attention-weight samples via characteristic-function MLE
M_2: estimate per-layer scale parameter γ and shift μ
M_3: renormalize attention weights by γ before VALUE projection (fat-tail allocation budget bound)
M_4: per-head split of α index, using different fat-tail allocation for different heads
stripped_llm_application: Per attention layer, fit a heavy-tailed parametric distribution to the post-softmax attention weights; estimate one tail-heaviness parameter and one scale parameter; renormalize attention weights by the estimated scale before value-projection; allow per-head independent tail-heaviness parameters.
novelty_claim_stripped: Heavy-tailed attention bias (Powerformer Feb 2025) is fixed by inductive prior (smooth heavy-tailed decay); per-head α-stable PARAMETRIC FIT and renormalization adapt to actual data distribution rather than fixed prior.
